description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:erbium Docker image and caches the node_modules directory. Define two stages, build and deploy, and apply a before_script that runs yarn install for every job. In the build stage add a build job (tagged docker) that executes yarn run build:example and publishes the dist directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job (tagged docker) that runs mkdir -p public and cp -r dist/example dist/index.html public/, then publishes the public folder as a pages artifact, and configure it to run only on the master branch.
